channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [IKIO] IKIO Tech: Madhu Pandit Appointed as Additional Director
item.description:
IKIO Technologies Ltd's board meeting on May 2, 2026, approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Ms. Madhu Pandit was appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Woman Independent Director) for a 5-year term, subject to shareholder approval. M/s Shiv Saroj & Associates were appointed as Internal Auditor. M/s Agarwal & Saxena will replace M/s. BGJC & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Narendra Prasad was appointed as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). The board also approved the Board Report, the AGM notice scheduled for June 27, 2026, and the re-appointment of Mr. Hardeep Singh as Managing Director. The deployment of ₹39.023 Crore from IPO proceeds was also approved.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Madhu Pandit appointed as Additional Director, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Agarwal & Saxena to replace BGJC & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors, pending shareholder approval.
  • Narendra Prasad appointed as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).
  • Deployment of ₹39.023 Crore from IPO proceeds approved for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IKIO Lighting Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IKIO] IKIO Tech Board Approves FY26 Audited Results, Appointments
item.description:
IKIO Technologies Ltd's board meeting on May 02, 2026, approved audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of Ms. Madhu Pandit as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Woman Independent Director) for a 5-year term, subject to shareholder approval. M/s Shiv Saroj & Associates were appointed as Internal Auditor. M/s Agarwal & Saxena were recommended as Statutory Auditors for 5 years, replacing M/s. BGJC & Associates LLP, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Narendra Prasad was appointed as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). The board approved the Board Report, the AGM notice (June 27, 2026), and the re-appointment of Mr. Hardeep Singh as Managing Director. Deployment of ₹39.023 Crore from IPO proceeds was also approved.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Madhu Pandit appointed as Non-Executive Woman Independent Director.
  • Agarwal & Saxena recommended as Statutory Auditors, subject to approval.
  • Narendra Prasad appointed as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).
  • IPO proceeds of ₹39.023 Crore to be deployed in FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IKIO Lighting Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NEETUYOSHI] Neetu Yoshi Ltd EGM on May 25, 2026
item.description:
Neetu Yoshi Ltd will hold an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) on May 25, 2026, via video conferencing. The meeting includes an agenda item to consider the issuance of convertible warrants on a preferential basis to promoters/promoter groups and others. The company is providing electronic voting (e-voting) facility to the members through CDSL, with the voting period commencing on May 22, 2026, and ending on May 24, 2026.

  • Neetu Yoshi EGM scheduled for May 25, 2026, via video conference.
  • EGM agenda includes issuance of convertible warrants on a preferential basis.
  • E-voting facility available for members via CDSL.
  • Voting period: May 22-24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neetu Yoshi Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace: Unaudited Financials for Sep 2025
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd has submitted unaudited financial results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025. The results were approved by the Board of Directors on March 2, 2026. The company's auditor has issued a limited review report, noting the company's failure to maintain an audit trail in its accounting software and an inability to verify balances with Union Bank of India due to a lack of bank statements.

  • Unaudited financial results for Sep 30, 2025 approved on March 2, 2026.
  • Limited review report issued by statutory auditors.
  • Company's website has the financial results: https://iisl.in/ financial-results.
  • Auditor notes lack of audit trail in accounting software.
  • Balances with Union Bank of India could not be verified.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace: Unaudited Financial Results for Quarter Ended June 2025
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd has announced the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on October 6, 2025. The results, along with the Limited Review Report by the Statutory Auditors, are available on the company's website. The meeting commenced at 5:30 P.M. and concluded at 5:50 P.M.

  • Unaudited financial results for Q1 2026 approved by the board.
  • Limited Review Report by Statutory Auditors enclosed.
  • Financial results available on the company website.
  • Board meeting held on October 6, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SMCGLOBAL] SMC Global Securities Appoints Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27
item.description:
SMC Global Securities Ltd's board has approved the appointment of M/s Aadit Sanyam & Associates, Chartered Accountants, as the Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. This decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on May 2, 2026, and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Details regarding the appointment are provided in Annexure A and will be available on the company's website.

  • M/s Aadit Sanyam & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment approved during the Board meeting on May 2, 2026.
  • The firm provides services including auditing, tax compliance, and corporate advisory.
  • Appointment complies with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMC Global Securities Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SMCGLOBAL] SMC Global Securities Authorizes KMPs for Materiality
item.description:
SMC Global Securities Ltd. has authorized key managerial personnel (KMPs) to determine the materiality of events or information, as per Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI Listing Regulations. The authorized KMPs include Mr. Ajay Garg, Mr. Anurag Bansal, and initially Mr. Vinod Kumar Jamar until June 30, 2026, followed by Mr. Rohit Nayyar from July 1, 2026. This decision was made by the Board of Directors and ensures compliance with disclosure requirements to the stock exchanges.

  • SMC Global authorizes KMPs for determining event materiality under SEBI regulations.
  • Ajay Garg and Anurag Bansal are authorized KMPs.
  • Vinod Kumar Jamar's tenure as KMP ends June 30, 2026.
  • Rohit Nayyar appointed as CFO and KMP, effective July 1, 2026.
  • KMPs are responsible for disclosures to stock exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMC Global Securities Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace Ltd: Unaudited Financials for Dec 2025
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd has submitted its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, as per Regulation 33 and Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The results were considered and approved by the Board of Directors on March 2, 2026. The company's auditor has issued a limited review report on the standalone financial results. The financial results are available on the company's website.

  • Unaudited financial results for quarter ended December 31, 2025, approved.
  • Limited review report issued by the Statutory Auditors.
  • Meeting commenced at 5.00 P.M. and concluded at 6.10 P.M.
  • Company has complied with PMLA provisions as represented by management.
  • Auditor noted the company has not maintained an audit trail feature in its accounting software.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace Approves Results for Sep 2024 Quarter
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd. has announced the approval of its unaudited financial results for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2024. The decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting held on May 21, 2025. The approved results, along with the Limited Review Report from the Statutory Auditors, are available on the company's website. The meeting commenced at 5:00 P.M. and concluded at 6:35 P.M.

  • India Infraspace approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended September 30, 2024.
  • Board of Directors meeting was held on May 21, 2025.
  • Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results are available on the company website.
  • Limited Review Report given by Statutory Auditors is enclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDINFRA] India Infraspace Ltd: Unaudited Results for Dec 2024
item.description:
India Infraspace Ltd has submitted unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2024, as per Regulation 33 and Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Board of Directors approved the results on May 21, 2025. The submission includes standalone and consolidated financial results along with the Limited Review Report by the Statutory Auditors. The meeting commenced at 5:00 PM and concluded at 6:35 PM.

  • Unaudited financial results for quarter ended December 31, 2024 approved.
  • Standalone and consolidated financial results included in submission.
  • Limited Review Report by Statutory Auditors enclosed.
  • Results available on the company website: https://iisl.in/financial-results.
  • Board meeting held on May 21, 2025, to approve results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Infraspace Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
